channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cybercriminals profit from World Cup by selling stolen streaming accounts
item.description: Fans avoiding broadcast fees fuel a black market for stolen streaming accounts worth nearly $220 million.

item.title: SpaceX stock declines after Wall Street analysts release optimistic targets
item.description: Bullish price targets from SpaceX underwriters preceded a stock drop, raising questions about analyst influence.

item.title: Trump faces dilemma between prolonged conflict and conceding Strait of Hormuz to Iran
item.description: The outcome of the Iran war may permanently alter the global energy trade.

item.title: Indeed chief economist: Aging Baby Boomers are America’s real labor problem, not AI
item.description: America's labor force will shrink by 6 million workers by 2032. Concerns about AI replacing jobs may be misplaced.
